visual_description: A medium shot focuses on a man in a dark suit and tie, standing in what appears to be a dimly lit office or command center. He has a serious, stern expression and looks slightly off-camera. In the background, other people are present; one person in a blue shirt with "FCCB" on the back is visible on the left, and another person sits at a computer in the lower right. A large board covered in photos is on the wall behind him. The Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in the upper left corner of the screen. The camera cuts to a close-up of a different man in a light-colored shirt, seen in profile. He is holding a phone to his ear, his expression intense and focused. The background is dark and out of focus. The "风行网" text remains in the upper left corner. The audio presents a tense and urgent exchange between two men in what sounds like a quiet, indoor environment. The first man speaks in a low, slightly exasperated tone, as if questioning someone's lack of knowledge or preparedness. He asks, "You don't even know the broadcast channel?"
